title: Quantities in meters vs catalog packaging units
notes: The customer orders in meters; the catalog sells packaging units (100m coils, 25m rolls, 2m sections). Expected quantities are package counts rounded up: 250m YDYp → 3 coils, 300m LgY → 3 coils, 50m peszel → 2 rolls, 10m korytko → 5 sections. The failure mode partial credit catches: right product, quantity copied as meters.

customer.name: PHU Elektryk-Bis
customer.profile: Installer who thinks in meters of cable, not in coils.

request: Proszę o wycenę: przewód YDYp 3x2,5 – 250 metrów, LgY 16mm² żółto-zielony – 300 metrów, peszel fi18 – 50 metrów, oraz korytko kablowe 40x40 – 10 metrów bieżących.
